title: From KBC Fame to Prison: Why This Tehsildar Who Sat Opposite Amitabh Bachchan Is Now Behind Bars- Here’s What Went Wrong
description: Amita Singh Tomar, a tehsildar from Sheopur who gained fame on 'Kaun Banega Crorepati', was arrested for her alleged role in a flood relief scam involving Rs 2.5 crore. The scam occurred during the 2021 flood in Baroda tehsil, where funds were fraudulently transferred to bogus accounts.
